title: Software Engineer I
description: Slack is seeking a Software Engineer I to build features that power collaboration for millions of teams. You'll write code, contribute to platform improvements, and grow your skills with experienced mentors. Work remotely for the leader in workplace collaboration.
responsibilities: Develop new features and improvements to the Slack platform
Write clean, maintainable code with thorough testing
Collaborate with product and design teams on implementation
Participate in code reviews and architectural discussions

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field (or equivalent experience)
